name: Clam Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add onion and cook until tender but not browned.
3. Add potatoes to the pot and add just enough water to cover them.
4. Cook the potatoes until they are tender.
5. Stir in chopped parsley, salt, and pepper.
6. Add clams with their juice.
7. Just before serving, stir in 2 cups milk and heat gently without boiling.
